title: Kenyan Vegetarian Wrap
description: A flavorful and nutritious wrap filled with the vibrant tastes of Kenya, perfect for a quick and easy meal. This vegetarian wrap combines textures and flavors to create a delightful meal.

ingredients.name: Kenyan vegetable mix (carrots, zucchini, bell peppers)

instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Add the Kenyan vegetable mix and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add the crispy fried onions and cook for another minute.
Spread the creamy avocado spread on the whole wheat wrap.
Add the cooked vegetable mix and onions on top of the avocado spread.
Drizzle the dense Kenyan chutney and vegetarian Kenyan sauce over the vegetables.
Sprinkle fresh cilantro and Kenyan spice blend over the wrap.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Fold the wrap to enclose the filling and serve immediately.
Serve with a side of Kenyan chips or salad for a complete meal.
